name: Zscaler Internet Access (ZIA)
description: Zscaler Internet Access API for managing URL filtering, firewall policies, security policies, and threat monitoring in the Zscaler cloud

auth_config.note: Session-based authentication via /authenticatedSession endpoint using API key, username, and password

actions.name: Authenticate
actions.description: Create an authenticated session for subsequent API calls

actions.name: List URL Filtering Rules
actions.description: Retrieve all URL filtering rules configured in ZIA

actions.name: Create URL Filtering Rule
actions.description: Create a new URL filtering rule to block or allow URL categories

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Rule definition including name, order, state, action (ALLOW/BLOCK/CAUTION), URL categories, and user/group assignments

actions.name: List URL Categories
actions.description: Retrieve all URL categories (custom and predefined) for filtering policies

actions.name: Create Custom URL Category
actions.description: Create a custom URL category with specific URLs or domains to block

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Custom category including configuredName, urls (list of URLs/domains), and superCategory

actions.name: List Firewall Rules
actions.description: Retrieve all cloud firewall rules configured in ZIA

actions.name: Create Firewall Rule
actions.description: Create a new cloud firewall rule for network-level traffic control

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Firewall rule including name, order, action (ALLOW/BLOCK_DROP/BLOCK_RESET), srcIps, destAddresses, and protocols

actions.name: Get Security Policy
actions.description: Retrieve the security policy settings (malware, phishing, botnet protection)

actions.name: Get Sandbox Report
actions.description: Retrieve a cloud sandbox analysis report for a file hash

parameters.name: md5_hash
parameters.description: MD5 hash of the file to retrieve the sandbox report for

actions.name: Activate Changes
actions.description: Activate pending configuration changes to make them effective
